
# TEAM_AGREEMENT.md — Free Sewaa Project

## Introduction

This document outlines the collaboration guidelines, responsibilities, and expectations for all members of the **Free Sewaa development team**.

The purpose of this agreement is to ensure that the team works in a **professional, organized, and respectful manner** throughout the development of the capstone project.

All team members agree to follow the principles described in this document to support effective teamwork and successful project completion.

---

# Team Information

**Project Name:** Free Sewaa — Community Donation Platform

**Repository:**
[https://github.com/CapstoneDesign-Spring2026-UlsanCollege/freesewaa](https://github.com/CapstoneDesign-Spring2026-UlsanCollege/freesewaa)

## Team Members

| Name               | Initial Role    |
| ------------------ | --------------- |
| Karki Swarnim Jung | Project Manager |
| Shrestha Sujan     | Scribe          |
| Tamang Sujan       | QA Lead         |
| Pathak Ram         | Demo Driver     |
| Khadka Mohan       | Developer       |

Roles may rotate during the project to ensure that each member gains experience in **development, testing, documentation, and presentation**.

---

# Team Values

Our team agrees to maintain the following core values throughout the project:

* **Respect** — All team members will treat each other respectfully and professionally.
* **Communication** — Team members will communicate clearly and promptly.
* **Responsibility** — Each member will complete assigned tasks on time.
* **Collaboration** — Members will support each other to ensure project success.
* **Accountability** — Every member is responsible for their contributions.

---

# Communication Guidelines

Effective communication is essential for successful collaboration.

The team will communicate through:

* Weekly team meetings
* Group messaging platforms
* GitHub discussions and issues

Important decisions, updates, and progress will be documented in the project repository.

Team members should respond to messages or questions **within a reasonable timeframe (24 hours when possible).**

---

# Roles and Responsibilities

Each team member is responsible for contributing to the following areas:

* **Project Planning**
* **Software Development**
* **Testing and Quality Assurance**
* **Documentation**
* **Final Demonstration**

Although team members may have assigned roles, the project will be developed collaboratively and members may assist one another when needed.

---

# GitHub Workflow

The team will follow a structured development workflow using GitHub.

Development process:

1. Create a GitHub **issue** describing the task.
2. Create a **feature branch** based on the issue.
3. Develop the feature.
4. Submit a **pull request**.
5. Conduct **code review**.
6. Merge the changes into the main branch.

This workflow ensures that development remains **organized, traceable, and collaborative**.

---

# Meeting Schedule

The team will conduct **regular weekly meetings** to discuss:

* Development progress
* Task assignments
* Issues or challenges
* Planning for the next sprint

Meeting notes may be recorded and stored in the project documentation.

---

# Conflict Resolution

If disagreements occur during the project, the team will follow these steps:

1. Discuss the issue openly within the team.
2. Attempt to resolve the issue through collaborative discussion.
3. If the issue cannot be resolved internally, consult the course instructor for guidance.

The goal is to maintain a **positive and professional working environment**.

---

# Participation Expectations

All team members are expected to:

* Attend scheduled meetings
* Complete assigned tasks
* Participate in discussions
* Review code and provide feedback
* Contribute to documentation

Consistent participation from all members is essential to ensure the success of the project.

---

# Agreement

By participating in the Free Sewaa project, all team members agree to follow the guidelines outlined in this document and work together to achieve the goals of the capstone project.

---
